title: Hugging Face Discloses AI Agent Attack Incident, Uses GLM5.2 for Log Forensic Analysis
excerpt: The world's largest AI open-source community, Hugging Face, recently disclosed that its servers were attacked by a hacker AI agent. After the incident, the secu
content_html:
The world's largest AI open-source community, Hugging Face, recently disclosed that its servers were attacked by a hacker AI agent. After the incident, the security team first attempted to use an API from a U.S. commercial cutting-edge large model to analyze over 17,000 logs related to the attack. However, due to the model's inability to accurately distinguish between incident response personnel and attackers, the security protection mechanism misclassified the requests and refused to provide analysis support.

Subsequently, Hugging Face deployed the Chinese open-source model GLM5.2 on its own infrastructure to conduct forensic analysis on the massive security logs and successfully completed the incident investigation.

This incident highlights that as AI agents increasingly participate in cyber attacks, security analysis now demands higher levels of understanding, reasoning, and deployment capabilities from large models. Compared to relying on cloud-based commercial APIs, locally deployed open-source models offer greater flexibility in terms of data security, access control, and task customization, and avoid analysis interruptions caused by platform security policies.

Compared to relying on cloud-based commercial APIs, locally deployed open-source models offer greater flexibility in terms of data security, access control, and task customization, and avoid analysis interruptions caused by platform security policies.

sentences.zh: 全球最大的AI开源社区Hugging Face近日披露其服务器遭到黑客AI代理攻击。

sentences.en: After the incident, the security team first attempted to use an API from a U.S. commercial cutting-edge large model to analyze over 17,000 logs related to the attack.

Compared to relying on cloud-based commercial APIs, locally deployed open-source models offer greater flexibility in terms of data security, access control, and task customization, and avoid analysis interruptions caused by platform security policies.

sentences.en: This incident highlights that as AI agents increasingly participate in cyber attacks, security analysis now demands higher levels of understanding, reasoning, and deployment capabilities from large models.
sentences.zh: 这一事件凸显出，随着人工智能代理越来越多地参与网络攻击，安全分析现在对大型模型的理解、推理和部署能力提出了更高水平的要求。

sentences.en: Compared to relying on cloud-based commercial APIs, locally deployed open-source models offer greater flexibility in terms of data security, access control, and task customization, and avoid analysis interruptions caused by platform security policies.
sentences.zh: 与依赖云端的商业API相比，本地部署的开源模型在数据安全、访问控制和任务定制方面提供了更大的灵活性，并避免了平台安全策略造成的分析中断。

content_html_zh:
全球最大的AI开源社区Hugging Face近日披露其服务器遭到黑客AI代理攻击。 事件发生后，安全团队首先尝试使用美国商业尖端大型模型的API来分析与攻击相关的17000多条日志。 但由于模型无法准确区分事件响应人员和攻击者，安全防护机制对请求进行了错误分类，拒绝提供分析支持。

随后，Hugging Face在自有基础设施上部署了中国开源模型GLM5.2，对海量安全日志进行取证分析，顺利完成了事件调查。

这一事件凸显出，随着人工智能代理越来越多地参与网络攻击，安全分析现在对大型模型的理解、推理和部署能力提出了更高水平的要求。 与依赖云端的商业API相比，本地部署的开源模型在数据安全、访问控制和任务定制方面提供了更大的灵活性，并避免了平台安全策略造成的分析中断。
